chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1132 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 02-10-2025 Mr. J.K. Jarwar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G. Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, D.A.G. Mr. Adnan Arshad, Special Prosecutor, NAB. **** Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition and submits that for redressal of his grievance, the petitioner will first avail his remedy before the Complaint Redressal Committee (CRC). Order accordingly. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
